raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint because Citibank failed to conduct a fair and thorough investigation into a documented fulfillment error by Best Buy ( XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX ). Despite my providing clear evidence of the merchant 's admission of fault, Citibank repeatedly favored the merchant. 
XXXX. Explicit Admission of Fulfillment Error : In an official chat on XX/XX/year>, Best Buy agent " XXXX '' explicitly stated, " Receiving a completely different brand than what was purchased... is a significant fulfillment error. '' He documented this in their system as XXXX XXXX XXXX. 
XXXX. Documented Service Failure : I followed Best Buys official return instructions to go to the XXXX, CA location. However, the store refused to assist me. The agent acknowledged this " service refusal at the XXXX store '' in my case file. He also noted that because the box provided by the XXXX store was " mismatched and unsecured, '' a standard return label was not a viable solution. 
XXXX. Bad Faith and Withholding of Evidence : The merchant promised to send the full chat transcriptincluding their acknowledgment of the errordirectly to me so I could provide it to my bank. They failed to do so, effectively withholding evidence that would prove my claim during XXXX dispute process. 
XXXX refusal to reverse this charge, despite these documented admissions by the merchant, is a failure to protect my rights as a consumer. I request a full refund for this failed transaction.
